G

GameManager - Class in mru.game.controller
This method sets the file path for the CasinoInfo file, as well as the player list and app menu.
GameManager() - Constructor for class mru.game.controller.GameManager
This constructor initializes the players, appMenu, loads the data, and launches the application
GameManagerTest - Class in mru.game.controller
 
GameManagerTest() - Constructor for class mru.game.controller.GameManagerTest
 
GameMenu - Class in mru.game.view
This class will show the GameMenu.

GameMenuTest - Class in mru.game.view

getBalance() - Method in class mru.game.model.Player
This method returns the user's stored balance
getBalanceTest() - Method in class mru.game.model.PlayerTest
 
getBetAmount() - Method in class mru.game.controller.PuntoBancoGame
This method returns the user's stored bet amount
getDeck() - Method in class mru.game.controller.CardDeck
The deck getter method

getFullDeck() - Method in class mru.game.controller.PuntoBancoGame
This method gets the full deck of cards
getName() - Method in class mru.game.model.Player
This method returns the user's stored name
getNameTest() - Method in class mru.game.model.PlayerTest
 
getNumberOfWins() - Method in class mru.game.model.Player
This method returns the user's stored number of wins
getNumWins() - Method in class mru.game.model.PlayerTest

rank getter method

this initializes the gameMenu
